kronifer/sb-waterloo-map.body: Fix the evil demand data bug
Actually added the airport demand back.

kronifer/sb-waterloo-map.name: v1.0.0
kronifer/sb-waterloo-map.body: Initial release of the Region of Waterloo map for Subway Builder. Please note that this map was not created or endorsed by the development team of the game.

kronifer/sb-zurich-map.name: v1.0.0
kronifer/sb-zurich-map.body: Initial release. Includes Airport and University data.

willbarouch/subwaybuilder-sydney.body: Add place labels, update OSM buildings
Add school and hospital demand data

soccerjonj/providence.body: v1.0 of my Subway Builder Providence mod. Attached is the zipped file for the Subway Builder Railyard.

soccerjonj/sacramento.body: v1.0 of my Sacramento Subway Builder Mod. Attached is the zipped file for the Subway Builder Railyard.

soccerjonj/nashville.body: Expanded the map to include nearby population hubs like Franklin, Cool Springs, Goodlettsville, Hendersonville, Gallatin, Lebanon, and Murfreesboro. Total demand in game went from 667,821 to 838,863. Attached is the zipped file for the Subway Builder Railyard

soccerjonj/nashville.name: v1.0
soccerjonj/nashville.body: v1.0 of my Subway Builder Nashville mod

barkuperman/tlv-mod.name: v2.0.0
barkuperman/tlv-mod.body: Big rehaul of the map using a completely different set of data that has much better resolution and is more accurate.

barkuperman/tlv-mod.name: v1.3.0
barkuperman/tlv-mod.body:
Better labels that now include villages and towns.
Fixed thumbnail for Map Manager v1.0.4.

barkuperman/tlv-mod.name: v1.2.0
barkuperman/tlv-mod.body:
TLV map for Subway Builder. To be used with Kronifer's Map Patcher.
Install guide here: https://subwaybuildermodded.com/

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ryandi.changelog: Upgraded to slurry's LODES demand tool with osmnx route calculation; added airport, university, and military base demand layers
Switched to LODES (Census LEHD Origin-Destination) data for demand generation; real commute flow patterns replace building-based estimates
Initial release: Spokane - The Lilac City

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ryandi.changelog: Initial release. 378,004 buildings from five sources (Overture, OKC City 2020 aerial servey, FEMA/ORNL, Microsoft, OSM). High-quality LODES demand data with pre-calculated routes. Includes Will Rogers World Airport (OKC), 7 universities, Tinker AFB, and entertainment venues.

https://maximilian284.github.io/subwaybu.changelog: Initial Railyard release with updated demand data and new buildings foundations data.

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rslurr.changelog: Combined result of INEGI's DENUE, CE, CPV, and ENOE data.  Covers from Montemorelos in the southeast to Hidalgo in the northwest.

https://maximilian284.github.io/subwaybu.changelog: Initial Railyard release with updated demand data and new buildings foundations data.

https://ryandicicco.github.io/Subway-Bui.changelog: Initial release (ported by ryandicicco). Original map by Lawrencelot. Covers the Rotterdam-The Hague metro corridor in the Randstad region, including Rotterdam Centrum, The Hague, Delft, Schiedam, Vlaardingen, and Rotterdam The Hague Airport (RTM).

https://ryandicicco.github.io/Subway-Bui.changelog: Fix: repaired corrupted buildings_index.json that prevented building demolition in-game.

Major update: merged 1.3M+ building footprints and 725K+ road segments from Overture Maps (Google Open Buildings + Microsoft + OSM). Demand data generated from building density via Voronoi tessellation.

https://ryandicicco.github.io/Subway-Bui.changelog: Added demand coverage for Uithoorn — residents and commute pairs now included.
Fixed oversized demand bubbles at major employment nodes (Schiphol, Aalsmeer, etc.).

Initial release. Real CBS (Statistics Netherlands) neighborhood data for population and jobs. Commute routes pre-calculated. Coverage includes Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Noord, Zuidoost/Bijlmer, Zuidas, Westpoort, Zaandam, Purmerend, Diemen, Amstelveen, Haarlemmermeer, and Schiphol (EHAM) with all piers.
